query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT alunoId) as total_alunos,
  COUNT(*) as total_sessoes,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT alunoId), 1) as media_sessoes_por_aluno,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode IS NOT NULL AND taskMode != 'sem_tarefa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sessoes_com_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'nao_entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tarefas_pendentes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'entregue' OR taskStatus = 'validada' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tarefas_entregues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'sem_tarefa' OR taskStatus IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN notaAlunoAplicabilidade IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_aplicabilidade_aluno,
  SUM(CASE WHEN notaMentoraAplicabilidade IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_aplicabilidade_mentora
FROM mentoring_sessions

  COUNT(*) as total_sessoes,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT alunoId), 1) as media_sessoes_por_aluno,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode IS NOT NULL AND taskMode != 'sem_tarefa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sessoes_com_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'nao_entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tarefas_pendentes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'entregue' OR taskStatus = 'validada' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tarefas_entregues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'sem_tarefa' OR taskStatus IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN notaAlunoAplicabilidade IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_aplicabilidade_aluno,
  SUM(CASE WHEN notaMentoraAplicabilidade IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_aplicabilidade_mentora
FROM mentoring_sessions
